revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

Copying from [[Category:旧暦10月]] to [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月24日'''は[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の24日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[安政]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1855年]][[12月3日]]） - [[長崎海軍伝習所]]設立される
== 誕生日 == * [[元文]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1740年]][[12月12日]]） - [[朱楽菅江]]、[[狂歌]]作者・[[戯作者]]（+ [[1800年]]） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1773年]][[12月7日]]） - [[徳川治紀]]、第7代[[水戸藩]]主（+ [[1816年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[寛弘]]8年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1011年]][[11月21日]]） - [[冷泉天皇]]、63代[[天皇]]（* [[950年]]） * [[宝永]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1708年]][[12月5日]]） - [[関孝和]]、[[数学者]]・[[和算]]の祖（* [[1642年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|23|10|25|9|24|11|10|1024}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:10月24日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]]

revision.comment: idk what haoppened but removing and re-adding the template
Text replacement - "日'''は" to "--> is the Nth day of "
Moving from [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] to [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
adding boilerplate intro to all the days
Text replacement - "六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]" to "六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]][[Category:先負]]"
Text replacement - "旧暦}}" to "旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}"

revision.text:
'''October 24 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar October}} ''October 24'''<!--Lunar October24--> is the Nth day of [[10月 (旧暦)|Lunar October]]の24日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]][[Category:先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[安政]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1855年]][[12月3日]]） - [[長崎海軍伝習所]]設立される
== 誕生日 == * [[元文]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1740年]][[12月12日]]） - [[朱楽菅江]]、[[狂歌]]作者・[[戯作者]]（+ [[1800年]]） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1773年]][[12月7日]]） - [[徳川治紀]]、第7代[[水戸藩]]主（+ [[1816年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[寛弘]]8年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1011年]][[11月21日]]） - [[冷泉天皇]]、63代[[天皇]]（* [[950年]]） * [[宝永]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1708年]][[12月5日]]） - [[関孝和]]、[[数学者]]・[[和算]]の祖（* [[1642年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|23|10|25|9|24|11|10|1024}}

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:not Butsumetsu]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:not Butsumetsu]] marking all the pages that are not butsumetsu so I can use process of elimination to tag all Butsumetsu pages using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
'''October 24 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar October}} ''October 24'''<!--Lunar October24--> is the Nth day of [[10月 (旧暦)|Lunar October]]の24日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]][[Category:先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[安政]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1855年]][[12月3日]]） - [[長崎海軍伝習所]]設立される
== 誕生日 == * [[元文]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1740年]][[12月12日]]） - [[朱楽菅江]]、[[狂歌]]作者・[[戯作者]]（+ [[1800年]]） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1773年]][[12月7日]]） - [[徳川治紀]]、第7代[[水戸藩]]主（+ [[1816年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[寛弘]]8年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1011年]][[11月21日]]） - [[冷泉天皇]]、63代[[天皇]]（* [[950年]]） * [[宝永]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1708年]][[12月5日]]） - [[関孝和]]、[[数学者]]・[[和算]]の祖（* [[1642年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|23|10|25|9|24|11|10|1024}}
[[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[ja:10月24日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:Lunar October]] {{citation needed}}
{{citation needed}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:先負]] [[Category:not Butsumetsu]][[sn:October 24 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:not Butsumetsu]]

'''October 24 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar October}} ''October 24'''<!--Lunar October24--> is the Nth day of [[10月 (旧暦)|Lunar October]]の24日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]][[Category:先負]]である。
== Events == * [[安政]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1855年]][[12月3日]]） - [[長崎海軍伝習所]]設立される
== Births == * [[元文]]5年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1740年]][[12月12日]]） - [[朱楽菅江]]、[[狂歌]]作者・[[戯作者]]（+ [[1800年]]） * [[安永 (元号)|安永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1773年]][[12月7日]]） - [[徳川治紀]]、第7代[[水戸藩]]主（+ [[1816年]]）
== Deaths == * [[寛弘]]8年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1011年]][[11月21日]]） - [[冷泉天皇]]、63代[[天皇]]（* [[950年]]） * [[宝永]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1708年]][[12月5日]]） - [[関孝和]]、[[数学者]]・[[和算]]の祖（* [[1642年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|23|10|25|9|24|11|10|1024}}

Text replacement - "Old Lunar Calendar360日" to "Lunar Calendar See Also"
Moving from [[Category:先負]] to [[Category:Senbu]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - " (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the" to "''' is the"
I think this is the glitch source
attempting again to remove the lunar calendar days comments that are causing problems
removing the annoying spaces that make editing harder
putting this here so I can replace it to insert all necessary interlanguage links into it
doing a mass replace to get the proper intweriki links for all the dates
Copying from [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

switching this to a specialized system of tracing completion

running another replacement to get rid of the category inappriproate overlap new ones added

Removing from [[Category:New pages most likely u]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
adding korean to all the dates

[[sn:October 24 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 24일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿四]] [[zh:十月廿四]] [[en:draft:October 24 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1855 AD|ja|1855年}} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日}}) – The {{ill|Nagasaki Naval Training Center|ja|長崎海軍伝習所}} is established.
== Births == * {{ill|Genbun|ja|元文}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1740 AD|ja|1740年}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}}) – {{ill|Shuraku Sugae|ja|朱楽菅江}}, a writer of comic verses and parodies (d. {{ill|1800 AD|ja|1800年}}). * {{ill|Annai|ja|安永}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773 AD|ja|1773年}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Harunori|ja|徳川治紀}}, the 7th lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|水戸藩}} (d. {{ill|1816 AD|ja|1816年}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kankō|ja|寛弘}} 8th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1011 AD|ja|1011年}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}}) – {{ill|Reisō Tennō|ja|冷泉天皇}}, the 63rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (born {{ill|950 AD|ja|950年}}). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1708 AD|ja|1708年}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}}) – {{ill|Seki Takakazu|ja|関孝和}}, a mathematician and the progenitor of {{ill|Wasan|ja|和算}} (born {{ill|1642 AD|ja|1642年}}).
[[Category:New Pages]][[ja:年表]]

[[sn:October 24 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 24일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿四]] [[zh:十月廿四]] [[en:draft:October 24 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1855 AD|ja|1855年}} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日}}) – The {{ill|Nagasaki Naval Training Center|ja|長崎海軍伝習所}} is established.
== Births == * {{ill|Genbun|ja|元文}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1740 AD|ja|1740年}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}}) – {{ill|Shuraku Sugae|ja|朱楽菅江}}, a writer of comic verses and parodies (d. {{ill|1800 AD|ja|1800年}}). * {{ill|Annai|ja|安永}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773 AD|ja|1773年}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Harunori|ja|徳川治紀}}, the 7th lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|水戸藩}} (d. {{ill|1816 AD|ja|1816年}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kankō|ja|寛弘}} 8th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]]{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1011 AD|ja|1011年}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}}) – {{ill|Reisō Tennō|ja|冷泉天皇}}, the 63rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (born {{ill|950 AD|ja|950年}}). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1708 AD|ja|1708年}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}}) – {{ill|Seki Takakazu|ja|関孝和}}, a mathematician and the progenitor of {{ill|Wasan|ja|和算}} (born {{ill|1642 AD|ja|1642年}}).

[[sn:October 24 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 24일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿四]] [[zh:十月廿四]] [[en:draft:October 24 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1855 AD|ja|1855年}} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日}} ) – The {{ill|Nagasaki Naval Training Center|ja|長崎海軍伝習所}} is established.
== Births == * {{ill|Genbun|ja|元文}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1740 AD|ja|1740年}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}} ) – {{ill|Shuraku Sugae|ja|朱楽菅江}} , a writer of comic verses and parodies (d. {{ill|1800 AD|ja|1800年}} ). * {{ill|Annai|ja|安永}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773 AD|ja|1773年}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Harunori|ja|徳川治紀}} , the 7th lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|水戸藩}} (d. {{ill|1816 AD|ja|1816年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kankō|ja|寛弘}} 8th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1011 AD|ja|1011年}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ) – {{ill|Reisō Tennō|ja|冷泉天皇}} , the 63rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (born {{ill|950 AD|ja|950年}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1708 AD|ja|1708年}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ) – {{ill|Seki Takakazu|ja|関孝和}} , a mathematician and the progenitor of {{ill|Wasan|ja|和算}} (born {{ill|1642 AD|ja|1642年}} ).

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|" to "{{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|"
revision.text:
[[sn:October 24 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 24일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿四]] [[zh:十月廿四]] [[en:draft:October 24 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1855 AD|ja|1855年}} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日}} ) – The {{ill|Nagasaki Naval Training Center|ja|長崎海軍伝習所}} is established.
== Births == * {{ill|Genbun|ja|元文}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1740 AD|ja|1740年}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}} ) – {{ill|Shuraku Sugae|ja|朱楽菅江}} , a writer of comic verses and parodies (d. {{ill|1800 AD|ja|1800年}} ). * {{ill|Annai|ja|安永}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773 AD|ja|1773年}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Harunori|ja|徳川治紀}} , the 7th lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|水戸藩}} (d. {{ill|1816 AD|ja|1816年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kankō|ja|寛弘}} 8th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1011 AD|ja|1011年}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ) – {{ill|Reisō Tennō|ja|冷泉天皇}} , the 63rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (born {{ill|950 AD|ja|950年}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1708 AD|ja|1708年}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ) – {{ill|Seki Takakazu|ja|関孝和}} , a mathematician and the progenitor of {{ill|Wasan|ja|和算}} (born {{ill|1642 AD|ja|1642年}} ).
[[Category:New Pages]] [[ja:年表]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|23|10|25|9|24|11|10|1024}}

revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:New Pages]] to [[Category:Completion tier 1]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[sn:October 24 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 24일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿四]] [[zh:十月廿四]] [[en:draft:October 24 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1855 AD|ja|1855年}} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日}} ) – The {{ill|Nagasaki Naval Training Center|ja|長崎海軍伝習所}} is established.
== Births == * {{ill|Genbun|ja|元文}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1740 AD|ja|1740年}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}} ) – {{ill|Shuraku Sugae|ja|朱楽菅江}} , a writer of comic verses and parodies (d. {{ill|1800 AD|ja|1800年}} ). * {{ill|Annai|ja|安永}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773 AD|ja|1773年}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Harunori|ja|徳川治紀}} , the 7th lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|Mito Domain}} (d. {{ill|1816 AD|ja|1816年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kankō|ja|寛弘}} 8th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1011 AD|ja|1011年}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ) – {{ill|Reisō Tennō|ja|冷泉天皇}} , the 63rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (born {{ill|950 AD|ja|950年}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1708 AD|ja|1708年}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ) – {{ill|Seki Takakazu|ja|関孝和}} , a mathematician and the progenitor of {{ill|Wasan|ja|和算}} (born {{ill|1642 AD|ja|1642年}} ).
[[Category:Completion tier 1]] [[ja:年表]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|23|10|25|9|24|11|10|1024}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵↵== See Also! ==" to " == See Also! =="
revision.text:
[[sn:October 24 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 24일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿四]] [[zh:十月廿四]] [[en:draft:October 24 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1855 AD|ja|1855年}} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日}} ) – The {{ill|Nagasaki Naval Training Center|ja|長崎海軍伝習所}} is established.
== Births == * {{ill|Genbun|ja|元文}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1740 AD|ja|1740年}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}} ) – {{ill|Shuraku Sugae|ja|朱楽菅江}} , a writer of comic verses and parodies (d. {{ill|1800 AD|ja|1800年}} ). * {{ill|Annai|ja|安永}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773 AD|ja|1773年}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Harunori|ja|徳川治紀}} , the 7th lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|Mito Domain}} (d. {{ill|1816 AD|ja|1816年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kankō|ja|寛弘}} 8th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1011 AD|ja|1011年}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ) – {{ill|Reisō Tennō|ja|冷泉天皇}} , the 63rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (born {{ill|950 AD|ja|950年}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1708 AD|ja|1708年}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ) – {{ill|Seki Takakazu|ja|関孝和}} , a mathematician and the progenitor of {{ill|Wasan|ja|和算}} (born {{ill|1642 AD|ja|1642年}} ).
[[Category:Completion tier 1]][[Category: tier 5]][[Category: tier 1]] [[ja:年表]] == See Also! ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|23|10|25|9|24|11|10|1024}}

[[sn:October 24 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 24일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿四]] [[zh:十月廿四]] [[en:draft:October 24 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1855 AD|ja|1855th year }} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日}} ) – The {{ill|Nagasaki Naval Training Center|ja|長崎海軍伝習所}} is established.
== Births == * {{ill|Genbun|ja|元文}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1740 AD|ja|1740th year }} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}} ) – {{ill|Shuraku Sugae|ja|朱楽菅江}} , a writer of comic verses and parodies (d. {{ill|1800 AD|ja|1800th year }} ). * {{ill|Annai|ja|安永}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773 AD|ja|1773rd year }} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Harunori|ja|徳川治紀}} , the 7th lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|Mito Domain}} (d. {{ill|1816 AD|ja|1816年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kankō|ja|寛弘}} 8th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1011 AD|ja|1011th year }} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ) – {{ill|Reisō Tennō|ja|冷泉天皇}} , the 63rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (born {{ill|950 AD|ja|950th year }} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1708 AD|ja|1708th year }} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ) – {{ill|Seki Takakazu|ja|関孝和}} , a mathematician and the progenitor of {{ill|Wasan|ja|和算}} (born {{ill|1642 AD|ja|1642nd year }} ).

[[sn:October 24 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 24일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿四]] [[zh:十月廿四]] [[en:draft:October 24 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1855 AD|ja|1855th year }} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日}} ) – The {{ill|Nagasaki Naval Training Center|ja|長崎海軍伝習所}} is established.
== Births == * {{ill|Genbun|ja|元文}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1740 AD|ja|1740th year }} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}} ) – {{ill|Shuraku Sugae|ja|朱楽菅江}} , a writer of comic verses and parodies (d. {{ill|1800 AD|ja|1800th year }} ). * {{ill|Annai|ja|安永}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773 AD|ja|1773rd year }} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Harunori|ja|徳川治紀}} , the 7th lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|Mito Domain}} (d. {{ill|1816 AD|ja|1816th year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kankō|ja|寛弘}} 8th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1011 AD|ja|1011th year }} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ) – {{ill|Reisō Tennō|ja|冷泉天皇}} , the 63rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (born {{ill|950 AD|ja|950th year }} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1708 AD|ja|1708th year }} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ) – {{ill|Seki Takakazu|ja|関孝和}} , a mathematician and the progenitor of {{ill|Wasan|ja|和算}} (born {{ill|1642 AD|ja|1642nd year }} ).

[[sn:October 24 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 24일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿四]] [[zh:十月廿四]] [[en:draft:October 24 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1855 AD|ja|1855th year }} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日}} ) – The {{ill|Nagasaki Naval Training Center|ja|長崎海軍伝習所}} is established.
== Births == * {{ill|Genbun|ja|元文}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1740 AD|ja|1740th year }} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}} ) – {{ill|Shuraku Sugae|ja|朱楽菅江}} , a writer of comic verses and parodies (d. {{ill|1800 AD|ja|1800th year }} ). * {{ill|Annai|ja|安永}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773 AD|ja|1773rd year }} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Harunori|ja|徳川治紀}} , the 7th lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|Mito Domain}} (d. {{ill|1816 AD|ja|1816th year }} ).

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] to [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[sn:October 24 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 24일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月24日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 24일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿四]] [[zh:十月廿四]] [[en:draft:October 24 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1855 AD|ja|1855th year }} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日}} ) – The {{ill|Nagasaki Naval Training Center|ja|長崎海軍伝習所}} is established.
== Births == * {{ill|Genbun|ja|元文}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1740 AD|ja|1740th year }} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}} ) – {{ill|Shuraku Sugae|ja|朱楽菅江}} , a writer of comic verses and parodies (d. {{ill|1800 AD|ja|1800th year }} ). * {{ill|Annai|ja|安永}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773 AD|ja|1773rd year }} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Harunori|ja|徳川治紀}} , the 7th lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|Mito Domain}} (d. {{ill|1816 AD|ja|1816th year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kankō|ja|寛弘}} 8th Year ([[Category:Lunar calendar translation marker]] {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1011 AD|ja|1011th year }} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ) – {{ill|Reisō Tennō|ja|冷泉天皇}} , the 63rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (born {{ill|950 AD|ja|950th year }} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1708 AD|ja|1708th year }} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ) – {{ill|Seki Takakazu|ja|関孝和}} , a mathematician and the progenitor of {{ill|Wasan|ja|和算}} (born {{ill|1642 AD|ja|1642nd year }} ).
[[Category:Completion tier 1]][[ja:年表]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|23|10|25|9|24|11|10|1024}}

revision.text:
[[cdo:10 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿四]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1855 AD|ja|1855th year }} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日}} ) – The {{ill|Nagasaki Naval Training Center|ja|長崎海軍伝習所}} is established.
== Births == * {{ill|Genbun|ja|元文}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1740 AD|ja|1740th year }} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日}} ) – {{ill|Shuraku Sugae|ja|朱楽菅江}} , a writer of comic verses and parodies (d. {{ill|1800 AD|ja|1800th year }} ). * {{ill|Annai|ja|安永}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773 AD|ja|1773rd year }} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Harunori|ja|徳川治紀}} , the 7th lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|Mito Domain}} (d. {{ill|1816 AD|ja|1816th year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kankō|ja|寛弘}} 8th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1011 AD|ja|1011th year }} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日}} ) – {{ill|Reisō Tennō|ja|冷泉天皇}} , the 63rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇}} (born {{ill|950 AD|ja|950th year }} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1708 AD|ja|1708th year }} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日}} ) – {{ill|Seki Takakazu|ja|関孝和}} , a mathematician and the progenitor of {{ill|Wasan|ja|和算}} (born {{ill|1642 AD|ja|1642nd year }} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|23|10|25|9|24|11|10|1024}}

revision.text:
[[cdo:10 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月廿四]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1855 AD|ja|1855th year|12=draft}} {{ill|December 3|ja|12月3日|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Nagasaki Naval Training Center|ja|長崎海軍伝習所|12=draft}} is established.
== Births == * {{ill|Genbun|ja|元文|12=draft}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1740 AD|ja|1740th year|12=draft}} {{ill|December 12|ja|12月12日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Shuraku Sugae|ja|朱楽菅江|12=draft}} , a writer of comic verses and parodies (d. {{ill|1800 AD|ja|1800th year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Annai|ja|安永|12=draft}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1773 AD|ja|1773rd year|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Harunori|ja|徳川治紀|12=draft}} , the 7th lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|ja|Mito Domain|12=draft}} (d. {{ill|1816 AD|ja|1816th year|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kankō|ja|寛弘|12=draft}} 8th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1011 AD|ja|1011th year|12=draft}} {{ill|November 21|ja|11月21日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Reisō Tennō|ja|冷泉天皇|12=draft}} , the 63rd {{ill|Emperor|ja|天皇|12=draft}} (born {{ill|950 AD|ja|950th year|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1708 AD|ja|1708th year|12=draft}} {{ill|December 5|ja|12月5日|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Seki Takakazu|ja|関孝和|12=draft}} , a mathematician and the progenitor of {{ill|Wasan|ja|和算|12=draft}} (born {{ill|1642 AD|ja|1642nd year|12=draft}} ).

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840302]] Wikidata name: 24th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 24|qq=October 24}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 24일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1855|1855 AD]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ) – The [[:en:Nagasaki Naval Training Center|Nagasaki Naval Training Center]] is established.
== Births == * [[:en:Genbun|Genbun]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1740|1740 AD]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]] ) – {{ill|Shuraku Sugae|ja|朱楽菅江|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shuraku Sugae|qq=|1=Akera Kankō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q417418}} , a writer of comic verses and parodies (d. <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月廿四]][[zh:十月廿四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840302]] Wikidata name: 24th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 24|qq=October 24}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 24일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1855|1855 AD]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ) – The [[:en:Nagasaki Naval Training Center|Nagasaki Naval Training Center]] is established.
== Births == * [[:en:Genbun|Genbun]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1740|1740 AD]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]] ) – {{ill|Shuraku Sugae|ja|朱楽菅江|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shuraku Sugae|1=Akera Kankō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q417418}} , a writer of comic verses and parodies (d. [[:en:1800|1800 AD]] ). * {{ill|Annai|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Annai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773 AD]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Harutoshi|Tokugawa Harunori]] , the 7th lord of the [[:en:Mito Domain|Mito Domain]] (d. [[:en:1816|1816 AD]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kankō|Kankō]] 8th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1011|1011 AD]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Reizei|Reisō Tennō]] , the 63rd [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] (born [[:en:950|950 AD]] ). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1708|1708 AD]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ) – [[:en:Seki Takakazu|Seki Takakazu]] , a mathematician and the progenitor of [[:en:Japanese mathematics|Wasan]] (born [[:en:1642|1642 AD]] ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月廿四]][[zh:十月廿四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840302]] Wikidata name: 24th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 24|qq=October 24}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 24일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1855|1855 AD]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ) – The [[:en:Nagasaki Naval Training Center|Nagasaki Naval Training Center]] is established.
== Births == * [[:en:Genbun|Genbun]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1740|1740 AD]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]] ) – {{ill|Shuraku Sugae|ja|朱楽菅江|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shuraku Sugae|1=Akera Kankō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q417418}} , a writer of comic verses and parodies (d. [[:en:1800|1800 AD]] ). * {{ill|Annai|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Annai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773 AD]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Harutoshi|Tokugawa Harunori]] , the 7th lord of the [[:en:Mito Domain|Mito Domain]] (d. [[:en:1816|1816 AD]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kankō|Kankō]] 8th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1011|1011 AD]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Reizei|Reisō Tennō]] , the 63rd [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] (born [[:en:950|950 AD]] ). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1708|1708 AD]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ) – [[:en:Seki Takakazu|Seki Takakazu]] , a mathematician and the progenitor of [[:en:Japanese mathematics|Wasan]] (born [[:en:1642|1642 AD]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|23|10|25|9|24|11|10|1024|qq=}}

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 24일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1855|1855 AD]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ) – The [[:en:Nagasaki Naval Training Center|Nagasaki Naval Training Center]] is established.
== Births == * [[:en:Genbun|Genbun]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1740|1740 AD]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]] ) – {{ill|Shuraku Sugae|ja|朱楽菅江|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shuraku Sugae|1=Akera Kankō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q417418}} , a writer of comic verses and parodies (d. [[:en:1800|1800 AD]] ). * {{ill|Annai|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Annai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773 AD]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Harutoshi|Tokugawa Harunori]] , the 7th lord of the [[:en:Mito Domain|Mito Domain]] (d. [[:en:1816|1816 AD]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kankō|Kankō]] 8th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1011|1011 AD]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Reizei|Reisō Tennō]] , the 63rd [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] (born [[:en:950|950 AD]] ). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1708|1708 AD]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ) – [[:en:Seki Takakazu|Seki Takakazu]] , a mathematician and the progenitor of [[:en:Japanese mathematics|Wasan]] (born [[:en:1642|1642 AD]] ).
== See Also ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1855|1855 AD]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ) – The [[:en:Nagasaki Naval Training Center|Nagasaki Naval Training Center]] is established.
== Births == * [[:en:Genbun|Genbun]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1740|1740 AD]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]] ) – {{ill|Shuraku Sugae|ja|朱楽菅江|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shuraku Sugae|1=Akera Kankō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q417418}} , a writer of comic verses and parodies (d. == Deaths == * [[:en:Kankō|Kankō]] 8th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1011|1011 AD]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Reizei|Reisō Tennō]] , the 63rd [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] (born [[:en:950|950 AD]] ). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1708|1708 AD]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ) – [[:en:Seki Takakazu|Seki Takakazu]] , a mathematician and the progenitor of [[:en:Japanese mathematics|Wasan]] (born [[:en:1642|1642 AD]] ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月廿四]][[zh:十月廿四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月廿四]][[zh:十月廿四]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 24 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月24日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 24일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 24 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月廿四]][[zh:十月廿四]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840302]] Wikidata name: 24th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:41, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 24|qq=October 24}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月廿四|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 24일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 24''' is the 24th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1855|1855 AD]] [[:en:December 3|December 3]] ) – The [[:en:Nagasaki Naval Training Center|Nagasaki Naval Training Center]] is established.
== Births == * [[:en:Genbun|Genbun]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1740|1740 AD]] [[:en:December 12|December 12]] ) – {{ill|Shuraku Sugae|ja|朱楽菅江|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shuraku Sugae|1=Akera Kankō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q417418}} , a writer of comic verses and parodies (d. [[:en:1800|1800 AD]] ). * {{ill|Annai|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Annai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 2nd Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773 AD]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Harutoshi|Tokugawa Harunori]] , the 7th lord of the [[:en:Mito Domain|Mito Domain]] (d. [[:en:1816|1816 AD]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kankō|Kankō]] 8th Year ( [[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1011|1011 AD]] [[:en:November 21|November 21]] ) – [[:en:Emperor Reizei|Reisō Tennō]] , the 63rd [[:en:Emperor of Japan|Emperor]] (born [[:en:950|950 AD]] ). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 5th Year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1708|1708 AD]] [[:en:December 5|December 5]] ) – [[:en:Seki Takakazu|Seki Takakazu]] , a mathematician and the progenitor of [[:en:Japanese mathematics|Wasan]] (born [[:en:1642|1642 AD]] ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} . == Events == * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1855|en|1855|WD=Q7673|lt=1855 AD}} {{ill|December 3|en|December 3|WD=Q2298|lt=December 3}} ) – The {{ill|Nagasaki Naval Training Center|en|Nagasaki Naval Training Center|WD=Q1456184|lt=Nagasaki Naval Training Center}} is established.
== Births == * {{ill|Genbun|en|Genbun|WD=Q1145754|lt=Genbun}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1740|en|1740|WD=Q7006|lt=1740 AD}} {{ill|December 12|en|December 12|WD=Q2369|lt=December 12}} ) – {{ill|Shuraku Sugae|ja|朱楽菅江|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shuraku Sugae|1=Akera Kankō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q417418}} , a writer of comic verses and parodies (d. {{ill|1800|en|1800|WD=Q6875|lt=1800 AD}} ). * {{ill|Annai|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Annai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 2nd Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1773|en|1773|WD=Q7692|lt=1773 AD}} {{ill|December 7|en|December 7|WD=Q2299|lt=December 7}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Harutoshi|en|Tokugawa Harutoshi|WD=Q728162|lt=Tokugawa Harunori}} , the 7th lord of the {{ill|Mito Domain|en|Mito Domain|WD=Q1146904|lt=Mito Domain}} (d. {{ill|1816|en|1816|WD=Q6953|lt=1816 AD}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kankō|en|Kankō|WD=Q2736722|lt=Kankō}} 8th Year ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1011|en|1011|WD=Q19238|lt=1011 AD}} {{ill|November 21|en|November 21|WD=Q3023|lt=November 21}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Reizei|en|Emperor Reizei|WD=Q374125|lt=Reisō Tennō}} , the 63rd {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|WD=Q208233|lt=Emperor}} (born {{ill|950|en|950|WD=Q23449|lt=950 AD}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|WD=Q1145262|lt=Hōei}} 5th Year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1708|en|1708|WD=Q6846|lt=1708 AD}} {{ill|December 5|en|December 5|WD=Q2300|lt=December 5}} ) – {{ill|Seki Takakazu|en|Seki Takakazu|WD=Q470531|lt=Seki Takakazu}} , a mathematician and the progenitor of {{ill|Japanese mathematics|en|Japanese mathematics|WD=Q1735738|lt=Wasan}} (born {{ill|1642|en|1642|WD=Q6912|lt=1642 AD}} ).
